info.name: Praxis LS — Phase 0 (Foundations)
info.description:
Phase 0 acceptance suite: platform login + tenant management, tenant auth (login/refresh/logout/2FA), IAM/RBAC admin (users, roles, capabilities, scopes, permissions, field-visibility), sessions + remote kill, audit ledger + soft-delete restore, settings, the Universal Event Engine (event-types/workflows/steps/approvals), and notifications (Watch-the-Watcher).

HOW TENANTS RESOLVE: the API picks the tenant from the HTTP Host header. `localhost` is the PLATFORM host, so tenant requests set `Host: {{tenantHost}}` (default smartls.praxisls.com). Two ways to make that work locally:
  1. In Postman, custom Host headers are sent as-is — nothing to configure.
  2. Or add `127.0.0.1 smartls.praxisls.com` to your hosts file and set baseUrl to http://smartls.praxisls.com:8080.

RUN ORDER: 1) Platform login  2) (if needed) Platform provision+go-live  3) Tenant login (captures tokens)  4) everything else. Login requests stash tokens into collection variables automatically.

exec: pm.test('reports a tenant', () => { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(JSON.stringify(j)).to.include('slug'); });
pm.test('got a platform token', () => pm.expect(tok, 'access token').to.be.a('string'));

if (pm.response.code === 200) { const j = pm.response.json(); const d = j.data || j; if (d.access_token) pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', d.access_token); if (d.refresh_token) pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', d.refresh_token); /* rotation: swap to the new refresh token so the previous one is now invalid (reuse → 401 SESSION_REVOKED) */ }

item.name: GET /users  (now gated — 200 as CEO, 403 without grant)

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const j = pm.response.json(); const rows = j.data || j; if (Array.isArray(rows) && rows[0] && rows[0].user_id) pm.collectionVariables.set('userId', rows[0].user_id); }
pm.test('401 without a token (proves it is gated)', () => pm.response.code === 401);
if (pm.response.code === 200) { const j = pm.response.json(); const rows = j.data || j; if (Array.isArray(rows) && rows[0] && rows[0].role_id) pm.collectionVariables.set('roleId', rows[0].role_id); }

item.name: GET /permissions  (the grant matrix — verify the seed)
POST /permissions  (grant a role a module — fires Watch-the-Watcher)
GET /catalogue/modules  (the MOD-xx list for the matrix)

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const j = pm.response.json(); const rows = j.data || j; if (Array.isArray(rows) && rows[0] && rows[0].session_id) pm.collectionVariables.set('sessionId', rows[0].session_id); }

item.name: GET /sessions  (all — needs MOD-68 grant or CEO)

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const j = pm.response.json(); const rows = j.data || j; if (Array.isArray(rows) && rows[0]) pm.collectionVariables.set('softDeleteId', rows[0].soft_delete_id || rows[0].id); }

item.name: POST /audit/soft-deletes/:id/restore  (must be a DIFFERENT admin than deleter)

exec: if (pm.response.code === 201) { const j = pm.response.json(); const w = j.data || j; if (w.workflow_id) pm.collectionVariables.set('workflowId', w.workflow_id); }
if (pm.response.code === 201) { const j = pm.response.json(); const s = j.data || j; if (s.workflow_step_id) pm.collectionVariables.set('stepId', s.workflow_step_id); }

item.name: GET /notifications  (after a permission/role change, expect a HIGH row for CEO/MGT)
POST /campaigns/:id/send  (queues one email per active subscriber)

exec: const d=(pm.response.json()||{}).data||{}; pm.test('queued count present', () => typeof d.queued === 'number');
